title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan co-founded Corgi to rebuild the insurance industry from the ground up rather than modernize legacy carriers. After 2 years of regulatory challenges and near-failure, the company secured a $108M Series A and is projected to reach hundreds of millions in ARR, demonstrating that fresh perspective and relentless execution create sustainable competitive advantages.
